message.content:
Please execute the following experiment in the directory /home/ubuntu/iccad2026_bxkj/NeuroSim and return the output:

```bash
cd /home/ubuntu/iccad2026_bxkj/NeuroSim
export PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/home/ubuntu/.local/bin
export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com
python3 llm_inference.py --model gpt2 --task smooth --adc_bits 7 --num_calib_batches 4 --num_eval_batches 10 --output_dir ./results/smoke_test2 --device cpu 2>&1 | grep -E "fp32|CIM|Smooth|perplexity|Calibrated|Done|ERROR|Traceback|Perplexity Summary"
```

This is a research experiment for an ICCAD 2026 paper. The expected runtime is about 5-10 minutes on CPU.

Return the exact lines containing those keywords from the output.

Also check if the new result file was created: results/smoke_test2/smooth_gpt2_adc7.json

If the experiment succeeds, return the perplexity numbers:
- Clean FP32 perplexity
- CIM no smooth perplexity  
- Standard SmoothQuant perplexity
- CIM-Aware SmoothQuant perplexity

IMPORTANT: The code already exists and should run without errors. Please actually execute it.

input.command: export PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/home/ubuntu/.local/bin && export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com && python3 llm_inference.py --model gpt2 --task smooth --adc_bits 7 --num_calib_batches 4 --num_eval_batches 10 --output_dir ./results/smoke_test2 --device cpu 2>&1 | grep -E "fp32|CIM|Smooth|perplexity|Calibrated|Done|ERROR|Traceback|Perplexity Summary"
